name: Enegan
notes:
## Our network **info**

*   AS208808 is performing **RPKI** validation and rejects invalids (since 2020)
    
*   AS208808 infrastructure is compliant with **[MANRS](https://www.manrs.org/)**
    
*   Our network hosts two **RIPE's** **Probe: [Milan](https://atlas.ripe.net/probes/1002921/) and [Rome](https://atlas.ripe.net/probes/1007445/)**
    
*   MIX-IT router locations: OHM Palermo, MiX Milan, Aruba IT4 Rome
    
*   DE-CIX Frankfurt, Germany backhauling from Milan
    
*   LINX LON1 London, UK backhauling from Milan
    
*   AMS-IX Amsterdam, Netherlands backhauling from Milan
    
*   We can evaluate PNIs request with minimum 100Mbps traffic in download direction.
